reviews.name: Soanar
reviews.title: A must-do Bali experience
reviews.quote: Our guides (Nyoman, Leo & crew) were fantastic - knowledgeable, experienced, and friendly. The trip was well organized, from hotel transfers to lunch stop and overland visit to Klingking Cliff.

reviews.name: Jack Wilson
reviews.title: Unbelievable
reviews.quote: The snorkeling was the best experience I have had - we saw many manta rays, a few turtles, coral, and tropical fish. I felt extremely safe and confident in their capable hands.

reviews.name: Michael D
reviews.title: Legends Roby and Aldo take us to the beautiful Manta Rays!
reviews.quote: We saw so many Manta Rays, turtles, all sorts of fish and topped it off with some music and champagne at the end. Highly recommend a trip with them and ask for Roby and Aldo if you get the chance.

reviews.name: Charlotte L
reviews.title: Incredible day with the crew
reviews.quote: From start to finish everything was seamless. The boat was clean, lunch was great and we saw everything we wanted to see. The crew were so helpful with photos too!

reviews.name: Linda L
reviews.title: A wonderful day!
reviews.quote: I felt well taken care of by the guides Olog and Gede. The tour is well organized with just the right amount of time at each stop.

trustIncluded.label: Private boat
trustIncluded.helper: Your group only, no shared seats.

trustIncluded.label: All entrance tickets
trustIncluded.helper: No extra fees on the day.

bookingSteps.title: Choose your boat
bookingSteps.subline: Pick the yacht that fits your group and budget.

bookingSteps.title: Get pickup details
bookingSteps.subline: We send the closest stop and a short time window.

faqs.a: Pick a date, choose your group size, pay securely, and get instant confirmation plus pickup details. No need to message us unless you have a special request.
Yes, taxes, tickets, and lunch are included. Optional upgrades (like private transfer) are clearly marked.

faqs.q: Can I book now and change the date later?
faqs.a: Yes. You can change your tour date anytime up to 24 hours before your tour.

faqs.q: When will I get my pickup time?
faqs.a: After booking, we send your closest pickup stop and a short time window based on your area.
If we cancel due to unsafe sea conditions, you can reschedule or receive a full refund. Light rain may not affect the tour.
Yes. Cancel up to 24 hours in advance for a full refund.

faqs.q: Will I definitely see manta rays?
faqs.a: Manta encounters depend on ocean conditions and wildlife activity. We plan the stop when conditions allow.

faqs.q: Do I need to be a strong swimmer?
faqs.a: You should be comfortable in the water. We provide snorkeling gear and guidance; flotation options are available upon request.

faqs.q: Is the tour suitable for kids?
faqs.a: Private tours are perfect for families with children of all ages — you set the pace.
Swimwear, sunscreen, a light cover-up, and a phone/camera. We provide towels and post-tour facilities.
Serangan Harbor (Bluuu lounge). We confirm pickup point and exact timing after booking.
Yes, private transfer from anywhere in Bali is available as an add-on.

policyItems: It is possible to cancel a reservation and receive a full refund, provided that the cancellation occurs at least 24 hours prior to the scheduled start time of the experience.
The Cars Transportation service is non-refundable if guests have already utilized it and the tour is canceled due to inclement weather conditions.
In order to receive a full refund, cancellation of a reservation must be made at least 24 hours prior to the scheduled start time of the experience.
If a cancellation occurs less than 24 hours prior to the scheduled start time of the experience, no refund or rescheduling will be granted.
Requests for changes to a reservation made less than 24 hours prior to the scheduled start time of the experience will not be accommodated.
Cut-off times are based on the experiences local time.
This experience is weather dependent and if it's canceled due to unfavorable conditions, alternative dates or a full refund will be provided.
For private tour bookings, if guests do not show up before 12:00, we reserve the right to cancel the trip.
The occurrence of this experience is contingent upon the approval of the Port Authority regarding the weather conditions.
Tours booked with DAY TRIP BALI PT may be subject to cancellation for various reasons, such as inclement weather, operational issues, or low enrollment.

cancellationCards.title: Cancel 24h+ before departure -> Full refund
cancellationCards.text: Cancel at least 24 hours before your scheduled start time and receive a full refund.

cancellationCards.title: Cancel within 24h -> No refund
cancellationCards.text: Cancellations made less than 24 hours before departure are non-refundable.

cancellationCards.title: Weather cancellation (by us) -> Full refund
cancellationCards.text: If we cancel due to unsafe sea conditions, you can reschedule or receive a full refund.

weatherGuarantee.title: Free reschedule
weatherGuarantee.text: Move your trip to the next available safe date with no additional fee.

weatherGuarantee.title: Full refund option
weatherGuarantee.text: Choose a full refund if you prefer not to reschedule.

weatherGuarantee.title: Fast notification
weatherGuarantee.text: We contact you quickly on WhatsApp when weather affects operations.
